title: Proximity Lamp
description: Adds 4 light modes: proximity, nocturnal, permanent and proximity-nocturnal. Works with redstone_lamp, candles, copper_bulbs and campfires.
body:
Proximity Lamp adds functionalities to manage lights. Works with redstone lamp, candles, copper bulbs and campfires. ``` ﻿/!\ BUKKIT is unsupported by this datapack. It seems to have troubles with "dropping item advancement", that are unfortunately required for this pack. ``` ## Procedure - Place a lightable block (redstone lamp, candles, copper bulbs, campfires) - Throw material on it ## Materials - **Redstone**: proximity mode. Can be stacked 1 to 5 to tweak distance detection. - **Quartz**: night mode. Only enable at night. - **Redstone + Quartz**: proximity mode, only during the night. - **Glowstone**: permanent lit (only on redstone lamp). Alternative to redstone power. - **White Wool**: toggle sound when enabling light. - **Bonemeal**: decrease redstone proximity level. Finaly destroy it. ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkpls:options/get```

Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
